  1. org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.listener

Uses of Package
org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.listener

Packages that use org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.listener
Package
Description
org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.configuration
Configuration classes for Spring Cloud Task Batch integration.
org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.listener
Stream-based batch listener components for Spring Cloud Task.
org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.listener.support
Support classes for stream-based batch listener components in Spring Cloud Task.
  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.listener used by org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.configuration
    Class
    Description
    TaskBatchExecutionListener
    Responsible for storing the relationship between a Spring Batch job and the Spring Cloud task it was executed within.
  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.listener used by org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.listener
    Class
    Description
    EventEmittingChunkListener
    Provides informational messages around the Chunk of a batch job.
    TaskBatchDao
    Maintains the association between a TaskExecution and a JobExecution executed within it.
  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.listener used by org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.listener.support
    Class
    Description
    TaskBatchDao
    Maintains the association between a TaskExecution and a JobExecution executed within it.
